who: HR managers in restaurants with 10-50 employees
offer: For HR managers in restaurants processing 10-50 employees, inefficient scheduling causes staff shortages. We automate scheduling instead of using spreadsheets and manual tracking.
problem: Inefficient manual scheduling and time-off request processes
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers
Indie Hackers discussions on scheduling issues
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Community forums for HR tools and resources
try_it: Let users try user-friendly scheduling and time-off management
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual scheduling
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminders for schedule notifications
Allow CSV import for existing employee data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
